name: Moneytree
description_short: Moneytree is a financial services branch in Lakewood, CO offering installment loans, check cashing, wire transfers, and prepaid cards with same-day funding options.
description_long:
Moneytree is a Colorado-based financial services provider with a physical branch location in Lakewood at 6901 W Alameda Avenue. The company operates extended hours (9 AM–7 PM most days, 10 AM–4 PM Sunday) and serves customers seeking quick access to short-term credit and cash services.

Moneytree's primary offerings include installment loans ranging from $100–$525 for first-time borrowers, check cashing services (personal, payroll, government, insurance, settlement, and cashier's checks), prepaid cards, wire transfers, and business check cashing. Installment loans feature flexible repayment terms with funds available in cash, ACH transfer, or Instant Funding to qualified debit cards. The company requires a valid ID, Social Security Number, proof of income, and an open checking account for loan applications.

Moneytree distinguishes itself through accessible loan amounts for first-time borrowers and multiple funding delivery methods including rapid Instant Funding (approximately 30–45 minutes in most cases). The branch provides in-person service alongside online application options, and the company explicitly states it does not lend to covered borrowers under the Military Lending Act, indicating regulatory compliance awareness.

However, Moneytree's installment loans carry very high APRs—the example $325 loan with a six-month term shows an APR of 100.92%, resulting in $95 in finance charges on a $325 principal. The company explicitly warns consumers that "small-dollar loans used over a long period of time can be expensive," and actual APRs may vary based on loan amount and repayment schedule. This is not a mainstream personal loan provider but rather a credit-constrained lending service for borrowers with limited alternatives.
pros: Multiple funding delivery methods: cash, ACH, or Instant Funding to qualified debit cards (30–45 minutes typical)
First-time borrower-friendly with loans as low as $100
Extended business hours including Saturday (9 AM–7 PM) and Sunday (10 AM–4 PM) availability
Flexible repayment terms: customers can choose loan length and payment frequency (e.g., biweekly)
Streamlined online and in-branch application process requiring minimal documentation
Comprehensive financial services beyond loans: check cashing, wire transfers, prepaid cards, business check cashing
Transparent APR and fee disclosure with sample loan fee documentation available
cons: Extremely high APRs (100.92% example) make loans expensive relative to traditional personal loan lenders
Small maximum loan amount ($525 for first-time borrowers) unsuitable for larger financial needs
Finance charges of $95 on a $325 loan represent 29% of principal cost; company explicitly warns loans are expensive over time
Limited to Colorado operation; not available nationwide
Does not serve Military Lending Act covered borrowers, reducing accessibility for servicemembers
best_for: Consumers with no credit history or poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Borrowers needing emergency cash under $525 with same-day or next-day access
Check cashing customers who need rapid fund access without a traditional bank account
Self-employed or gig workers with flexible income documentation needs
diagnosis: Moneytree is best for credit-constrained borrowers in Colorado needing emergency cash under $525 with rapid access and flexible terms, or customers seeking convenient check cashing and wire transfer services. The critical caveat is the 100%+ APR on installment loans—this is predatory-adjacent lending for borrowers with no better options, not a competitive personal loan provider. Use only if other alternatives (credit unions, payday alternative loans, family loans) are unavailable.
services: Consumer installment loans with flexible repayment terms
Check cashing (personal, payroll, government, insurance, settlement, cashier's, retirement, pension checks)
Instant Funding to qualified debit cards
